title: Silly's Crop XP
description:
Gain experience points from harvesting crops!
This mod adds XP rewards when breaking fully grown crops. The amount of XP and which crops give it can be configured via the mod's config.
body:
**Gain XP from harvesting crops in Minecraft.**

Lightweight server-side mod rewards players with experience points for breaking fully grown crops. Perfect for **survival**, **SMP**, or **RPG**-style servers.

## Features
- **Gain XP when harvesting:** Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroot, Nether Wart
- Lightweight and optimized
- Configurable Minimum and Maximum values for each crop

## 🔧 Configuration
**The mod includes a standard JSON config file:**
Customize XP per crop
Enable or disable specific crops by removing them from the JSON config file
> **Located at:** YOUR WORLD SAVE/sillys_crop_xp.json

## Requirements
| Requirements| Why?|
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
|[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)|Required by most Fabric mods|

## Compatibility
- Supports Minecraft versions **1.20 – 1.21.8**
- Fabric Mod Loader
- Server-side only (clients don’t need it)
 
## FAQ
**How do I update the config?**

Navigate to your world save folder and open the sillys_crop_xp.json file using any text editor.
Each crop entry contains two numbers:
- **The minimum XP granted**
- **The maximum XP granted**
  
Edit the values as needed, save the file, and then restart your server or rejoin your world (in singleplayer) for changes to take effect.

**I accidentally removed a crop or want to restore defaults. What do I do?**

Delete the sillys_crop_xp.json file in your world save.
The mod will automatically regenerate it the next time you start the server or load the world in singleplayer.

## Feedback
Suggestions or issues?

Open an issue on [Github](https://github.com/sillygoober2/Sillys-Crop-XP) or reach out via Discord (Discord ID: **gwabgwab**)
